title: Customer model and lookup endpoint
tech: Node.js, TypeScript, Express, PostgreSQL, Prisma 6, Zod
keyConstraints: TypeScript strict mode, Zod validation server-side, .nullish() not .optional().nullable(), Prisma selects must include all returned fields
description: Add a Customer model to the database and a lookup endpoint so dispatchers can find returning customers by phone number during job creation.
acceptanceCriteria: Customer model has: id, name, phone (unique, indexed), email (optional), type (PRIVATE | BUSINESS enum), companyName (optional), referenceNumber (optional), createdAt. Migration created and applied.
GET /api/customers?phone=<partial> returns matching customers (max 10), safe fields only, requires Admin or Dispatcher role
POST /api/customers creates a new customer; phone uniqueness enforced with 409 on conflict
All routes require authenticateToken and adminOrDispatcher role middleware
Zod validation on create body; use .nullish() not .optional().nullable()
implementationNotes: phone is the primary lookup key — add @@index([phone])
Follow existing pattern: route → service → Prisma; response shape { data: ... }
Do not store sensitive payment data
